race.comment: AMORUSO (10) kept fresh for this and back in grade after fading to finish sixth over 1000m at Walcha. Trained locally and now in the Aiden St Vincent stable. Top-four contender. CARDSHARP (2) comes back a few levels for this and won at the trip. Snagged back from the gate and never threatened when eighth over 1250m at Taree in C4 class. Maps well with the claim and look for him doing his best work late. LA CACHE A VIN (6) is one worth keeping safe along with UNSNOOZUAL (3) who kicks off for a new yard. Has plenty of pace and should be up in the firing line for a long way.
